languages.text: "Вы обознались. Единственная Элана, кого я знаю — это Элана Неколеблющаяся, святая сектора {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Каликсис{/g}. Она вряд ли встала бы на нашу сторону".

traits.locale_text: "Вы обознались. Единственная Элана, кого я знаю — это Элана Неколеблющаяся, святая сектора {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Каликсис{/g}. Она вряд ли встала бы на нашу сторону".

languages.text: "You are mistaken. The only Elana I know is Elana the Unshaken, the saint of the {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} Sector. She would hardly take our side in this."
languages.original_text: "Вы обознались. Единственная Элана, кого я знаю — это Элана Неколеблющаяся, святая сектора {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Каликсис{/g}. Она вряд ли встала бы на нашу сторону".

traits.locale_text: "You are mistaken. The only Elana I know is Elana the Unshaken, the saint of the {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} Sector. She would hardly take our side in this."
"You are mistaken. The only Elana I know is Elana the Unshaken, the saint of the {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} Sector. She would hardly take our side in this."
"You are mistaken. The only Elana I know is Elana the Unshaken, the saint of the {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} Sector. She would hardly take our side in this."

languages.text: “你搞错了。我所知道的埃拉娜，就只有那位{g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}卡利西斯{/g}星区的圣人，不动摇者埃拉娜。她可不会站在我们这边。”
languages.original_text: "You are mistaken. The only Elana I know is Elana the Unshaken, the saint of the {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} Sector. She would hardly take our side in this."

traits.locale_text: “你搞错了。我所知道的埃拉娜，就只有那位{g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}卡利西斯{/g}星区的圣人，不动摇者埃拉娜。她可不会站在我们这边。”

languages.text: « Il y a erreur sur la personne. La seule Elana que je connaisse est Elana l'Inébranlable, la sainte du secteur {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g}. Et en l'occurrence, elle ne se serait certainement pas rangée de notre côté. »
languages.original_text: "You are mistaken. The only Elana I know is Elana the Unshaken, the saint of the {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} Sector. She would hardly take our side in this."

traits.locale_text: « Il y a erreur sur la personne. La seule Elana que je connaisse est Elana l'Inébranlable, la sainte du secteur {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g}. Et en l'occurrence, elle ne se serait certainement pas rangée de notre côté. »

languages.text: "Yanılıyorsun. Tanıdığım tek Elana, {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} Sektörü'nün azizesi Sarsılmaz Elana'dır. Bu meselede bizim yanımızda durması pek olası değil."
languages.original_text: "You are mistaken. The only Elana I know is Elana the Unshaken, the saint of the {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} Sector. She would hardly take our side in this."

traits.locale_text: "Yanılıyorsun. Tanıdığım tek Elana, {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} Sektörü'nün azizesi Sarsılmaz Elana'dır. Bu meselede bizim yanımızda durması pek olası değil."

languages.text: «Se equivoca. La única Elana que conozco es Elana la Inquebrantable, la santa del sector {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g}. Y ella no estaría de nuestro lado en este conflicto».
languages.original_text: "You are mistaken. The only Elana I know is Elana the Unshaken, the saint of the {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} Sector. She would hardly take our side in this."

traits.locale_text: «Se equivoca. La única Elana que conozco es Elana la Inquebrantable, la santa del sector {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g}. Y ella no estaría de nuestro lado en este conflicto».

languages.text: "Ihr irrt Euch. Die einzige Elana, die ich kenne, ist Elana die Unerschütterliche, die Heilige des {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g}-Sektors. Sie würde sich wohl kaum auf unsere Seite schlagen."
languages.original_text: "You are mistaken. The only Elana I know is Elana the Unshaken, the saint of the {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} Sector. She would hardly take our side in this."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr irrt Euch. Die einzige Elana, die ich kenne, ist Elana die Unerschütterliche, die Heilige des {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g}-Sektors. Sie würde sich wohl kaum auf unsere Seite schlagen."

languages.text: 「あなたは間違っています。私が知っているエラーナは、{g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}カリス{/g}星域の聖人である揺るぎないエラーナだけです。彼女は、この件で私たちの味方になることはほとんどありません。」
languages.original_text: "You are mistaken. The only Elana I know is Elana the Unshaken, the saint of the {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} Sector. She would hardly take our side in this."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたは間違っています。私が知っているエラーナは、{g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}カリス{/g}星域の聖人である揺るぎないエラーナだけです。彼女は、この件で私たちの味方になることはほとんどありません。」
